channel.title: Edgar's Personal Wiki
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Edgar's Personal Wiki

item.title: Edgar's Personal Wiki
item.description: Edgar’s Personal Wiki Public notebook This is the public edge of a private working wiki: source-backed notes about software, systems, books, institutions, and the moments where fiction explains reality better than reality explains itself.

item.title: agentic-self-service-analytics
item.description: Agentic Self-Service Analytics Agentic self-service analytics is the use of AI agents to answer business analytics questions directly for stakeholders while preserving the source-of-truth discipline that data teams normally provide.

item.title: organizational-ai-learning-loops
item.description: Organizational AI Learning Loops Organizational AI learning loops are firm-owned systems that turn human judgment, workflows, domain knowledge, private evals, internal traces, and maintained knowledge bases into AI capability that improves with use.

item.title: technology-and-worker-power
item.description: Technology and Worker Power Technology and worker power is the core institutional thesis from Power and Progress: productivity growth becomes shared prosperity only when workers have enough bargaining, political, and social power to shape technology’s direction and claim part of its gains.

item.title: satya-nadella
item.description: Satya Nadella Satya Nadella enters the wiki through A Frontier Without An Ecosystem Is Not Stable, a 2026-06-14 X Article on enterprise AI, firm learning loops, and the political economy of frontier models.

item.title: index
item.description: Post-AI World Post-AI world is this wiki’s working section for the social, institutional, and personal consequences of advanced AI becoming a central economic and political force.

item.title: work-income-and-meaning
item.description: Work, Income, and Meaning The work problem in the post-AI world has two layers: how people get material security if AI reduces demand for cognitive labor, and how people preserve agency, purpose, and skill when more work can be delegated to machines.

item.title: frontier-without-ecosystem
item.description: A Frontier Without An Ecosystem Is Not Stable A frontier without an ecosystem is not stable is a 2026-06-14 X Article by Satya Nadella.

item.title: satya-nadella
item.description: Satya Nadella On X Satya Nadella’s X account is currently represented in this wiki by one X Article about the future of the firm in an AI-driven economy.

item.title: ai-commissioning
item.description: AI Commissioning AI commissioning is the shift from using an AI system as a closely steered assistant to briefing an agentic model on an ambitious outcome, letting it execute through a long and partly hidden workflow, and then judging the delivered artifact.
